SEARCH
Package hu.bme.mit.theta.dve.frontend.dsl.gen

Class dveBaseListener

java.lang.Object
hu.bme.mit.theta.dve.frontend.dsl.gen.dveBaseListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
dveListener, org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
public class dveBaseListener extends Object implements dveListener
This class provides an empty implementation of dveListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    dveBaseListener()

      public void enterModel(dveParser.ModelContext ctx)
      Enter a parse tree produced by dveParser.model().

      The default implementation does nothing.

      ctx - the parse tree
